Third-party notices for drainware-lobo UI helpers

ImPlot
Source: https://github.com/epezent/implot
License: MIT. Vendored files: implot.h, implot_internal.h, implot.cpp, implot_items.cpp. Demo file intentionally not compiled.

ImGuizmo helper widgets
Source: https://github.com/CedricGuillemet/ImGuizmo
License: MIT. Vendored files: ImCurveEdit.h, ImCurveEdit.cpp, ImGradient.h, ImGradient.cpp, ImZoomSlider.h. Full 3D gizmo code and demo/example files are intentionally not compiled.

imgui-node-editor
Not vendored. It is only useful once a real node-based visual preset graph is implemented; current preset cards remain lighter and lower risk.
